criteria.acceptance_criterion: test-only mock implementation returns fixed, deterministic [{newPath, sectionRanges}] + redirect-summary fixtures
criteria.covered_by_test: TestMockSplitProposer/default_plan_for_known_fixture_input (calls ProposeSplit twice with identical fileContent, asserts identical FixtureSplitPlan both times)

criteria.acceptance_criterion: unblocks split-sequence testing before real ProposeSplit RPC exists (caller-configurable, reusable)
criteria.covered_by_test: TestMockSplitProposer/caller-registered_plan_keyed_by_exact_fileContent (WithPlan) and MockSplitProposer being exported from a non-_test.go file for cross-package reuse

criteria.acceptance_criterion: error path must not be acted on (per SplitProposer doc contract)
criteria.covered_by_test: TestMockSplitProposer/caller-registered_error_keyed_by_exact_fileContent_takes_precedence and /default_error_when_no_fixture_matches (both assert zero SplitPlan{} returned alongside non-nil error)

criteria.acceptance_criterion: SectionRange fixtures are well-formed (0 <= Start <= End <= len(fileContent))

criteria.covered_by_test: self-consistency step: go test ./split/... -run TestMockSplitProposer -count=1 -timeout 5m (from engine/) - PASS

criteria.acceptance_criterion: no regressions to existing engine/split tests (2b.1.1/2b.1.2/2b.1.3/2b.2.1)
criteria.covered_by_test: self-consistency step: go test ./split/... -race -v -count=1 -timeout 10m - all existing tests (TestSplitProposerInterface, TestThresholdDetection, TestNewTriggerValidation, TestDefaultTrigger, TestCrossesThreshold, TestSplittingStatusIsolation, guard tests) PASS unchanged
